calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Dec-06-2004 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Dec-06-2004 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on as re-assigned by the Master Calendar Dept. 206 for Prove-Up Hearing/Court Trial this day.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Tony Vaughn.
John Eng, Esq. special appearance for Plaintiff: Bank of America, N.A. (USA)
No appearance by the Defendant: Miguel A. Lagos.
Declaration of Plaintiff's witness: Deborah Fitzpatrick in Lieu of personal testimony at trial filed in court.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant: Miguel A. Lagos as follows:
Principal $2,417.85
Prejudgment Interest $181.50
Attorney's Fees $520.00
Costs $195.00 for a total of $3,314.62
Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-02-2004 Set For Trial On Dec-06-04 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206
